ddls:
CREATE TABLE "trips" (
  "trip_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each trip */,
  "call_type" TEXT /* Type of call (e.g., C for Standard, B for Premium) */,
  "origin_call" INTEGER /* Origin call identifier */,
  "origin_stand" INTEGER /* Origin stand identifier (pickup location) */,
  "taxi_id" INTEGER /* Taxi identifier */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the trip in Unix time */,
  "day_type" INTEGER /* Type of day (e.g., weekday, weekend) */,
  "missing_data" INTEGER /* Indicates if data is missing */,
  "pickup_location_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the pickup location */,
  "dropoff_location_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the dropoff location */,
  "trip_distance" REAL /* Distance of the trip in miles */,
  "trip_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the trip in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trip_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trips_taxi_id FOREIGN KEY ("taxi_id") REFERENCES taxis ("taxi_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trips_pickup_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("pickup_location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trips_day_type FOREIGN KEY ("day_type") REFERENCES day_types ("day_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trips_call_type FOREIGN KEY ("call_type") REFERENCES call_types ("call_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trips_dropoff_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("dropoff_location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "taxis" (
  "taxi_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each taxi */,
  "license_plate" TEXT /* License plate number of the taxi */,
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the driver operating the taxi */,
  "taxi_type" TEXT /* Type of taxi (e.g., sedan, SUV) */,
  "vehicle_make" TEXT /* Make of the taxi vehicle */,
  "vehicle_model" TEXT /* Model of the taxi vehicle */,
  "vehicle_year" INTEGER /* Year of manufacture of the taxi vehicle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("taxi_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "drivers" (
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each driver */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the driver */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* License number of the driver */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the driver */,
  "driver_status" TEXT /* Status of the driver (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("driver_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trip_routes" (
  "route_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each route entry */,
  "trip_id" TEXT /* Identifier for the associated trip */,
  "polyline" TEXT /* Encoded polyline representing the route */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* List of latitude points for the route */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* List of longitude points for the route */,
  "route_distance" REAL /* Distance of the route in miles */,
  "route_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the route in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("route_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trip_routes_trip_id FOREIGN KEY ("trip_id") REFERENCES trips ("trip_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "day_types" (
  "day_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each day type */,
  "day_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the day type (e.g., Weekday, Weekend) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("day_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "call_types" (
  "call_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each call type */,
  "call_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the call type (e.g., Standard, Premium) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("call_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "trip_id" TEXT /* Identifier for the associated trip */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (scale of 1-5) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments provided by the user */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date the feedback was given */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_feedback_trip_id FOREIGN KEY ("trip_id") REFERENCES trips ("trip_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trip_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stats entry */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date for the statistics */,
  "total_trips" INTEGER /* Total number of trips on that date */,
  "total_revenue" REAL /* Total revenue collected on that date */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average rating for trips on that date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trip_stats_date FOREIGN KEY ("date") REFERENCES date_dimension ("date")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "date_dimension" (
  "date_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each date */,
  "date" TEXT /* The actual date */,
  "day_of_week" TEXT /* Day of the week for the date */,
  "is_weekend" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the date is a weekend */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("date_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "trip_id" TEXT /* Identifier for the associated trip */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount charged for the trip */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., cash, card) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payment_transactions_trip_id FOREIGN KEY ("trip_id") REFERENCES trips ("trip_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_reports" (
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each incident report */,
  "trip_id" TEXT /* Identifier for the associated trip */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the incident */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the incident was reported */,
  "incident_type" TEXT /* Type of incident (e.g., accident, complaint) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("incident_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_reports_trip_id FOREIGN KEY ("trip_id") REFERENCES trips ("trip_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dispatch_system" (
  "dispatch_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dispatch system */,
  "dispatch_name" TEXT /* Name of the dispatch system */,
  "dispatch_description" TEXT /* Description of the dispatch system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dispatch_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trip_dispatch" (
  "trip_id" TEXT /* Identifier for the associated trip */,
  "dispatch_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the dispatch system used */,
  "dispatch_time" TEXT /* Time the trip was dispatched */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trip_id", "dispatch_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fleet_managers" (
  "fleet_manager_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fleet manager */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the fleet manager */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the fleet manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fleet_manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fleet_management" (
  "fleet_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fleet */,
  "fleet_name" TEXT /* Name of the fleet */,
  "fleet_manager_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the fleet manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fleet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fleet_management_fleet_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("fleet_manager_id") REFERENCES fleet_managers ("fleet_manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "taxi_fleets" (
  "taxi_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the associated taxi */,
  "fleet_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the fleet */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date the taxi was assigned to the fleet */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("taxi_id", "fleet_id")
)
